name: Taco Kahuku
tagline: North Shore taco truck with fresh fish tacos that rival the shrimp trucks without the crazy lines.
mustOrder: Fresh fish taco — grilled catch of the day with slaw and crema
Garlic shrimp taco — North Shore shrimp truck flavors in taco form
Burrito bowl — rice, beans, fresh fish, and all the fixings
parking: Roadside pull-off area on Kamehameha Hwy near the other Kahuku food trucks.
talkStory: While everyone queues 45 minutes at Giovanni's and Romy's shrimp trucks, Taco Kahuku quietly serves some of the best fish tacos on the North Shore with almost no wait. Located in the same Kahuku food truck strip, it's the smart local move — fresh-caught fish, generous portions, and you can mix and match with shrimp from next door. Great alternative if someone in your group doesn't want shrimp.
